attributes.Sql Query:
SEL CTRL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID, 
NULL AS PL_NODE_VALUE,
NULL AS ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
NULL AS SUB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
'OTHER' AS FUNCTIONAL_COST,
ZEROIFNULL(TS_COA_AMT) as TS_COA_AMT
FROM (SELECT
FETCHAMT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FETCHAMT.TS_FETCH_AMT,
COAAMT.TS_COA_AMT
FROM
(
SELECT A.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
SUM(A.TS_FETCH_AMT) TS_FETCH_AMT
FROM (
SELECT
RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
TRIM(SUM(ZEROIFNULL(NJEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT ) -ZEROIFNULL(NJEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT))) TS_FETCH_AMT
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR       RFM ON (NJEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  =RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT )   
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY NJE ON  (NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT = NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT AND NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NJE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS_TV NSOB ON (NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AND NSOB.END_TV_DT='3500-01-01')
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY NPLH ON ( NJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NPLH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE AND NJEL.DD_BK_DEPT_CD = NPLH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE AND NPLH.NODE_LEVEL05_NAME ='TSS (SUPPORT)')
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.R_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_HIERARCHY NFAH ON (NJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD = NFAH.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AND NFAH.LEVEL03_ACCT_GROUP_ID ='EXPENSE' AND NFAH.LEVEL04_ACCT_GROUP_ID <> 'NON EXPENSE SSOT OTHER') 
WHERE (  NJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD  IN ( 'MO' , 'MC' ) OR ( NJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD = 'UO' AND NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_CATEGORY_NAME =  'REVALUATION' AND NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME = 'REVALUATION' AND NSOB.PUSH_TO_GLBL_CONSOL_BOOKS_FLG ='Y' ) )  
GROUP BY RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
UNION ALL /* DCD Elimination inclusion*/
SELECT FMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
,TRIM(SUM(ZEROIFNULL(EXM.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT)-ZEROIFNULL(EXM.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT))) TS_FETCH_AMT
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_EXPENSE_MEASURE EXM
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR FMY
    ON  (EXM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT = FMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
    AND  EXM.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD IN ('MO','MC')) AND EXM.TRANSACTION_TYPE='FA_ELIM'
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS_TV SOB
    ON  (EXM.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = SOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AND SOB.END_TV_DT = '3500-01-01')  
    INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY PLH 
    ON  (EXM.BK_COMPANY_CODE=PLH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE 
    AND EXM.DD_BK_DEPT_CD = PLH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE 
    AND PLH.NODE_LEVEL05_NAME ='TSS (SUPPORT)')
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.R_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_HIERARCHY FAH 
    ON  (EXM.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD = FAH.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
    AND FAH.Level03_Acct_group_ID='Expense'  AND FAH.Level04_Acct_Group_ID <> 'Non Expense SSOT Other')
GROUP BY FMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT/* DCD Elimination inclusion*/ ) A
GROUP BY FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
)FETCHAMT

INNER JOIN(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT, CAST(SUM(USD_UNIT_NAT_NET) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) TS_COA_AMT
FROM (SELECT                
BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD ,
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
DD_BK_DEPT_CD ,
SUM(USD_NAT_NET)/SUM(NO_OF_TIMES) USD_UNIT_NAT_NET 
FROM (SELECT                  
PARM.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD ,
BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
DD_BK_DEPT_CD ,
DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(USD_REV_NET)) USD_REV_NET ,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(USD_NAT_NET)) USD_NAT_NET ,
COUNT(*) NO_OF_TIMES
FROM ( SELECT                
  JEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
  JEL.DD_BK_DEPT_CD ,
  JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
  FMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT ,
  SUM ( (ZEROIFNULL(JEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT) - ZEROIFNULL(JEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT)) *-1) USD_REV_NET ,
  SUM((ZEROIFNULL(JEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT) - ZEROIFNULL(JEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT)) ) USD_NAT_NET 
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE JEL ,
  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  FMY
  WHERE JEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT=FMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
  AND JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD IN ('MO','MC') 
  AND JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD BETWEEN '50000' AND '59999'  
  GROUP BY 
  JEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
  JEL.DD_BK_DEPT_CD ,
  JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
  FMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
UNION ALL 
  SELECT 
  BK_COMPANY_CD  AS BK_COMPANY_CODE   ,   
  BK_HFM_REPORTED_DEPARTMENT_CD ,
  BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD   ,    
  NFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT ,
  SUM((CONSOLIDATED_BALANCE_USD_AMT  ) * -1 )AS USD_REV_NET,
  SUM(CONSOLIDATED_BALANCE_USD_AMT )AS USD_NAT_NET
  FROM 
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HFM_ACCOUNT_BALANCE NHB,
  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  NFM
  WHERE NFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=NHB.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT*100+NHB. BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT  
  AND NHB.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG ='N' 
  AND NHB.BK_ROLLUP_CATEGORY_CD ='USD Total'
  AND NHB.DEPARTMENT_TYPE<> 'FINANCIAL DEPARTMENT'
  AND NHB.BK_COMPANY_CD = '010'
  AND BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD  BETWEEN '50000' AND '59999'
  AND NFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT>=201302
  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 )C ,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_PARAMETER PARM  
WHERE PARM.INCLUSION_FLG='Y' 
AND PARM.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD='SUPPTMATLCOSTS' 
AND DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD BETWEEN PARM.BK_ACCOUNT_RANGE_LOW_CD 
AND PARM.BK_ACCOUNT_RANGE_HIGH_CD 
AND DD_BK_DEPT_CD  BETWEEN PARM.BK_DEPARTMENT_RANGE_LOW_CD 
AND PARM.BK_DEPARTMENT_RANGE_HIGH_CD 
AND BK_COMPANY_CODE BETWEEN PARM.BK_COMPANY_RANGE_LOW_CD 
AND PARM.BK_COMPANY_RANGE_HIGH_CD 
GROUP BY PARM.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD ,
BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
DD_BK_DEPT_CD ,
DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT

UNION ALL 

SELECT          
PARM.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD ,
BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
DD_BK_DEPT_CD ,
DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(USD_REV_NET)) USD_REV_NET ,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(USD_NAT_NET)) USD_NAT_NET ,
COUNT(*) NO_OF_TIMES 
FROM (  
SELECT                   
JEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
JEL.DD_BK_DEPT_CD ,
JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
FMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
SUM((ZEROIFNULL(JEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT) - ZEROIFNULL(JEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT)) ) USD_REV_NET ,
SUM((ZEROIFNULL(JEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT) - ZEROIFNULL(JEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT)) ) USD_NAT_NET 
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE JEL ,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  FMY 
WHERE JEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT=FMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
AND JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD IN ('MO','MC') 
AND JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD BETWEEN '50000' AND '59999' 
GROUP BY 
JEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
JEL.DD_BK_DEPT_CD ,
JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
FMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
UNION ALL
SELECT 
BK_COMPANY_CD  AS BK_COMPANY_CODE   ,           
BK_HFM_REPORTED_DEPARTMENT_CD ,
BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD   ,    
NFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
SUM((CONSOLIDATED_BALANCE_USD_AMT  ) )AS USD_REV_NET,
SUM(CONSOLIDATED_BALANCE_USD_AMT )AS USD_NAT_NET
FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_HFM_ACCOUNT_BALANCE NHB,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  NFM
WHERE NFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=NHB.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT*100+NHB. BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT
AND NHB.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG ='N' 
AND NHB.BK_ROLLUP_CATEGORY_CD ='USD Total'
AND NHB.DEPARTMENT_TYPE<> 'FINANCIAL DEPARTMENT'
AND NHB.BK_COMPANY_CD = '010'
AND BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD  BETWEEN '50000' AND '59999'
AND NFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT>=201302
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 
)C ,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_PARAMETER PARM 
WHERE PARM.INCLUSION_FLG='N' 
AND PARM.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD='SUPPTMATLCOSTS' 
AND DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD BETWEEN PARM.BK_ACCOUNT_RANGE_LOW_CD AND PARM.BK_ACCOUNT_RANGE_HIGH_CD 
AND DD_BK_DEPT_CD  BETWEEN PARM.BK_DEPARTMENT_RANGE_LOW_CD AND PARM.BK_DEPARTMENT_RANGE_HIGH_CD 
AND BK_COMPANY_CODE BETWEEN PARM.BK_COMPANY_RANGE_LOW_CD AND PARM.BK_COMPANY_RANGE_HIGH_CD 
GROUP BY   
PARM.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD
,BK_COMPANY_CODE
,DD_BK_DEPT_CD
,DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
) B
GROUP BY 
BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD ,
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
DD_BK_DEPT_CD 
HAVING SUM(USD_REV_NET) <> 0
) G 
GROUP BY FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
)COAAMT
ON FETCHAMT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=COAAMT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT) A
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RF
ON A.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID CTRL
ON RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = CTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
GROUP BY 1,5,6
attributes.Pre SQL:
DELETE FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_INPUT_DOLLAR WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN 
(SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID);

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID,PL_NODE_VALUE,DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD,FUNCTIONAL_COST,SUM(USD_ACTUAL_AMOUNT) 
FROM
(SELECT COALESCE(D.PL_NODE_VALUE,A.PL_NODE_VALUE) AS PL_NODE_VALUE,
A.FISCAL_MONTH_ID,A.DEPT_NUMBER,A.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,A.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD,A.USD_ACTUAL_AMOUNT,
COALESCE(D.FUNCTIONAL_COST,A.FUNCTIONAL_COST) AS FUNCTIONAL_COST 
FROM
(SELECT COALESCE(C.PL_NODE_VALUE,A.PL_NODE_VALUE) AS PL_NODE_VALUE,
A.FISCAL_MONTH_ID,A.DEPT_NUMBER,A.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,A.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD,A.USD_ACTUAL_AMOUNT,
COALESCE(C.FUNCTIONAL_COST,A.FUNCTIONAL_COST) AS FUNCTIONAL_COST 
FROM
(SELECT B.PL_NODE_VALUE,A.FISCAL_MONTH_ID,A.DEPT_NUMBER,A.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,A.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD,A.USD_ACTUAL_AMOUNT,B.FUNCTIONAL_COST
FROM
(SELECT  
CTRL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID FISCAL_MONTH_ID
,EA.BK_COMPANY_CODE||EA.DD_BK_DEPT_CD AS DEPT_NUMBER
,EA.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,EA.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(EA.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT)-ZEROIFNULL(EA.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT)) USD_ACTUAL_AMOUNT
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_EXPENSE_ACTUALS EA,
$$STGDB.WI_FINANCE_ACCOUNTS ACC,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT DEP,
$$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY  PL,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RF,
$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID CTRL
WHERE 
EA.BK_COMPANY_CODE=DEP.BK_COMPANY_CODE AND 
EA.DD_BK_DEPT_CD=DEP.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE AND
DEP.BK_COMPANY_CODE=PL.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE AND 
DEP.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE=PL.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE AND  
PL.NODE_LEVEL05_NAME='TSS (SUPPORT)' AND
EA.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD= ACC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AND
EA.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD=ACC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE 
AND ( 
EA.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD IN ('MO','MC') 
OR  ( EA.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD = 'UO' AND EA.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_CATEGORY_NAME =  'REVALUATION' AND EA.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME = 'REVALUATION' AND EA.PUSH_TO_GLBL_CONSOL_BOOKS_FLG ='Y')
)
AND ACC.LEVEL03_ACCT_GROUP_ID ='EXPENSE' 
AND ACC.LEVEL04_ACCT_GROUP_ID <> 'NON EXPENSE SSOT OTHER' 
AND DEP.FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME <> 'NON-SI-DEPT' 
AND EA.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT = RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = CTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
GROUP BY CTRL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID,EA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
,EA.DD_BK_DEPT_CD
,EA.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,EA.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD) A

LEFT JOIN (SELECT SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE,(PL.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE||PL.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE) DEPARTMENT_CODE,SSC.FUNCTIONAL_COST
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY PL, $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_MAPPING_ALLOCATION SSC, $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID CTRL
WHERE COALESCE(UPPER(SSC.ACCOUNT_NUMBER), 'EXPENSE') = 'EXPENSE'
AND (PL.NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE)
AND SSC.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = CTRL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID) B

ON B.DEPARTMENT_CODE = A.DEPT_NUMBER) A

LEFT JOIN (SELECT SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE,(PL.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE||PL.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE) DEPARTMENT_CODE ,SSC.ACCOUNT_NUMBER,SSC.FUNCTIONAL_COST
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY PL, $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_MAPPING_ALLOCATION SSC, $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID CTRL
WHERE COALESCE(SSC.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, 'EXPENSE') <> 'EXPENSE'
AND SSC.SUB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IS NULL
AND (PL.NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE)
AND SSC.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = CTRL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID) C

ON C.DEPARTMENT_CODE = A.DEPT_NUMBER AND C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = A.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD )A

LEFT JOIN (SELECT  SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE, (PL.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE||PL.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE) DEPARTMENT_CODE, SSC.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, SSC.SUB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, SSC.FUNCTIONAL_COST
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY PL, $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_MAPPING_ALLOCATION SSC, $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID CTRL
WHERE COALESCE(UPPER(SSC.ACCOUNT_NUMBER), 'EXPENSE') <> 'EXPENSE'
AND SSC.SUB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL
AND (PL.NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE
OR PL.NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE = SSC.PL_NODE_VALUE)
AND SSC.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = CTRL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID) D

ON D.DEPARTMENT_CODE = A.DEPT_NUMBER AND D.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = A.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD AND D.SUB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = A.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD ) A

GROUP BY FISCAL_MONTH_ID,PL_NODE_VALUE,DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD,FUNCTIONAL_COST HAVING FUNCTIONAL_COST IS NOT NULL
